## Meeting Purpose

[Sprint check-in and strategy discussion for Augment Code's growth initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/sWonpbmLvAi2k9TPRaWL9dpwoifm8RxY?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content strategy showing early success, especially comparison articles (9% conversion rate)](https://fathom.video/share/sWonpbmLvAi2k9TPRaWL9dpwoifm8RxY?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Shifting focus from newsletter to more impactful growth areas (SEO, backlinks, video)](https://fathom.video/share/sWonpbmLvAi2k9TPRaWL9dpwoifm8RxY?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
  - [Plans to improve enterprise outreach through targeted workshops and events](https://fathom.video/share/sWonpbmLvAi2k9TPRaWL9dpwoifm8RxY?tab=summary&timestamp=1211.0)
  - [Need for better audience targeting in YouTube ads to increase spend efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/sWonpbmLvAi2k9TPRaWL9dpwoifm8RxY?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance and SEO Strategy

  - [Comparison articles and listicles performing well (7-9% conversion rate)](https://fathom.video/share/sWonpbmLvAi2k9TPRaWL9dpwoifm8RxY?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Current sign-up conversion rate: 1-2% (vs. 7-9% site-wide benchmark)](https://fathom.video/share/sWonpbmLvAi2k9TPRaWL9dpwoifm8RxY?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
  - [Backlink building in progress, targeting AI coding keyword](https://fathom.video/share/sWonpbmLvAi2k9TPRaWL9dpwoifm8RxY?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Considering restructuring content organization for better SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/sWonpbmLvAi2k9TPRaWL9dpwoifm8RxY?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)
  - [Exploring ways to get mentioned and trained into different AI models](https://fathom.video/share/sWonpbmLvAi2k9TPRaWL9dpwoifm8RxY?tab=summary&timestamp=1375.0)

### CLI Template Marketplace

  - [Design work started; awaiting PRD from Jason](https://fathom.video/share/sWonpbmLvAi2k9TPRaWL9dpwoifm8RxY?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)
  - [Sylvain to provide more details on implementation](https://fathom.video/share/sWonpbmLvAi2k9TPRaWL9dpwoifm8RxY?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)

### Newsletter and User Onboarding

  - [Newsletter showing good click-through rates despite lower open rates](https://fathom.video/share/sWonpbmLvAi2k9TPRaWL9dpwoifm8RxY?tab=summary&timestamp=967.0)
  - [Plan to automatically add new users to newsletter via Customario sequence](https://fathom.video/share/sWonpbmLvAi2k9TPRaWL9dpwoifm8RxY?tab=summary&timestamp=1071.0)
  - [Considering reallocating resources from newsletter to more impactful areas](https://fathom.video/share/sWonpbmLvAi2k9TPRaWL9dpwoifm8RxY?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)

### Video Content and YouTube Ads

  - [Increased focus on video content in the past 2-3 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/sWonpbmLvAi2k9TPRaWL9dpwoifm8RxY?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)
  - [Struggling to spend money wisely on YouTube ads due to audience targeting challenges](https://fathom.video/share/sWonpbmLvAi2k9TPRaWL9dpwoifm8RxY?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)
  - [Competitor comparisons and language-specific content performing better](https://fathom.video/share/sWonpbmLvAi2k9TPRaWL9dpwoifm8RxY?tab=summary&timestamp=1484.0)

### Enterprise Outreach Strategy

  - [Shifting focus from self-serve developer to team-based approach](https://fathom.video/share/sWonpbmLvAi2k9TPRaWL9dpwoifm8RxY?tab=summary&timestamp=1643.0)
  - [Planning automated outbound campaigns with educational content on AI benefits](https://fathom.video/share/sWonpbmLvAi2k9TPRaWL9dpwoifm8RxY?tab=summary&timestamp=1562.0)
  - [Considering workshops and events to demonstrate practical AI implementation](https://fathom.video/share/sWonpbmLvAi2k9TPRaWL9dpwoifm8RxY?tab=summary&timestamp=1819.0)
